message: 🌱 Add helm: Add 'helm install --app-version' command/versioning a chart  mission (#360)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-3555-add-helm-install-app-version-command-versioning-a-chart-against-an-app",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: Add 'helm install --app-version' command/versioning a chart against an app version",
+    "description": "Add 'helm install --app-version' command/versioning a chart against an app version. This issue affects 184+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify helm deploy symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your helm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=helm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Add 'helm install --app-version' command/versioning a chart against an app version"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant helm resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nAs far as I'm aware, `helm install` currently only supports specifying the `--version` flag to specify a chart version to install.\n\nI'm unsure how the 'appVersion' field in a Chart.yaml is supposed to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add 'helm install --app-version' command/versioning a chart ",
+        "description": "* Automated cherry pick of #522 (jetstack/cert-manager#615)\n```yaml\n$ helm package myapp --app-version 1.0.0\r\n$ helm install myapp-1.0.0.tgz\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Add 'helm install --app-version' command/versionin is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=helm -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: * Automated cherry pick of #522 (jetstack/cert-manager#615). This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ helm package myapp --app-version 1.0.0\r\n$ helm install myapp-1.0.0.tgz",
+        "$ helm package myapp --app-version 1.0.0\r\n$ helm install myapp-1.0.0.tgz"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
